name: Cherry On The Cake
author: Poki
description: Cherry On The Cake is a delightful platform game where you get to top off cakes with more than just cherries! Take on creative challenges to complete unique and wacky cakes. Each level will surprise you with new situations to solve and obstacles to overcome. Complete levels and unlock the craziest skins to customize your ingredients and make the game even more hilarious. Are you ready to put the cherry on the cake? How to play Cherry On The Cake? Click and hold to aim, and release to shoot. Who created Cherry On The Cake? Cherry On The Cake is created by Kebit. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cherry On The Cake for free? You can play Cherry On The Cake for free on Poki. Can I play Cherry On The Cake on mobile devices and desktop? Cherry On The Cake can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
